title: Aurora, 33902, Palm Pals Happy Birthday Cake 5In, Soft Toy, White
features: Introducing the Palm Pals Happy Birthday Cake Soft Toy, the latest addition to Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This adorable plush is a white cake with pink and blue polka dots and a small candle with a sparkly flame on top. It's filled with beans and perfectly fits into your palm. It's great for small cuddling and makes a wonderful gift for any occasion, especially birthdays!

The Happy Birthday Cake is part of the Palm Pals Craving collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Whimsical, Pets, Aquatic, Zoo, Barn and many more. These soft toys are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and feature inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials.

The Palm Pals Happy Birthday Cake is suitable from birth and measures 13cm. Birthday cake always has the sweetest gift! Whenever there's a birthday, Birthday Cake has got it covered. It keeps a very detailed list of every Palm Pals's likes and dislikes, so the perfect gift can be given when their birthday comes around. No party is complete without Happy BirthDay Cake being on the guest list. This sweet Happy Birthday Cake is sure to win everyone's hearts!

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful plush and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
